title: Frustrated Customer - Internet Keeps Dropping
description: A customer working from home is experiencing intermittent internet drops and is frustrated. Needs troubleshooting guidance.

persona.name: David
persona.goal: Get the internet connection stabilized so they can work

background_context: The customer has been experiencing internet drops every 30 minutes since yesterday morning. They work from home and just got disconnected from an important video call with their boss. They have already tried restarting their router once.
opening_message: I'm so frustrated right now. My internet keeps dropping every half hour and I just got kicked out of a video call with my boss! I already restarted my router but it's still happening. I work from home and I can't keep losing connection like this. Please help!
success_criteria: Acknowledge the impact of the issue on their work
Guide them through advanced troubleshooting steps
Check for local outages or known issues
Offer a callback or follow-up if issue persists
common_mistakes: Asking them to restart the router again without acknowledging they already did
Being dismissive of their anxiety about work
Not explaining why each troubleshooting step matters
